dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pattern entry conditions: (1) Day 1 closes higher than previous close; (2) Days 2-3 show tall upper wicks relative to body (bear trap); (3) Price eventually closes above pattern high (upward breakout). Exit on reversal (close below previous close) or at max hold of 10 days. Success rate and volume parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT by source and excluded from rule set. Bar properties (upper_wick, body) used to identify the three-day candlestick formation.

backtest_rule.reason: Pattern entry conditions: (1) Day 1 closes higher than previous close; (2) Days 2-3 show tall upper wicks relative to body (bear trap); (3) Price eventually closes above pattern high (upward breakout). Exit on reversal (close below previous close) or at max hold of 10 days. Success rate and volume parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT by source and excluded from rule set. Bar properties (upper_wick, body) used to identify the three-day candlestick formation.

source_rule_text: Bullish continuation pattern characterized by three candlesticks where bears create tall upper shadows on days 2-3 as a bear trap, followed by bulls entering and price closing above the pattern high for an upward breakout
